flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Webster University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.2k → $21.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Webster University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (77.2% → 68.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Webster University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.7k → $31.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Webster University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
